title: ESP32 USB sensor node benchmark fixture
representative_intent: ESP32-C3 USB-C 3.3V board with I2C temperature sensor

requirements.text: Provide USB-C 5 V sink input with explicit CC pull-down evidence.
Generate and verify a 3.3 V logic rail for ESP32 and I2C sensor loads.
Connect an I2C environmental sensor with SDA/SCL pull-ups to the logic rail.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim the board is electrically correct, manufacturable, certified, or production-ready.
